radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription package selection radio buttons. Defines the button style, list of package options, purchase behavior, and indicator alignment. Each button is resolved from the 'subscription_button' remote settings.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio indicator circle on each button. Values: 'left' (default) places the indicator on the left side; 'right' places it on the right side; 'none' hides the indicator entirely.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

buttons.description: Array of individual radio button items representing subscription package options. Each button references a subscription button component and defines its selection state, colors, badge, and layout configuration.

badge.description: Optional badge overlay displayed on the radio button, typically used to highlight promotions or savings (e.g., 'BEST DEAL', 'SAVE 50%'). Contains text, styling, and visibility rules based on selection state.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

color.description: Color applied to the badge text and used in the badge TextConfig. Color value from the backend.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color applied to the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color applied to the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend.

variant.description: Badge visual style variant identifier that determines the badge appearance.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true, the badge is only visible when the parent radio button is selected; it is hidden when the button is deselected.

text.description: Badge label text displayed on the radio button. Supports %% delimited placeholders for dynamic price replacement (e.g., '%%package_id%%' is replaced with calculated percentage savings).

selected_bg_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color applied to the radio button when it is in the disabled/deselected state. Color value from the backend.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

selected_border_color.description: Border color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is selected by default when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, the radio button is rendered with enlarged dimensions (increased height/padding) for visual emphasis.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subscription button component definition from the 'subscription_button' remote settings key. The resolved component provides CTA button styling, package info, and text configuration.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the disabled/deselected state. Color value from the backend.

border_color.description: Border color applied to the radio button in its default/deselected state. Color value from the backend.

gradient_type.description: Gradient style applied to the radio button badge. Passed to the RadioBoxBadge model and used for badge visual styling.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting a radio button triggers the purchase flow immediately (via double-tap behavior) instead of requiring a separate CTA button press.

type.description: Determines the visual style of the radio button component. Values: 'tiers_style' renders the OptimusHalfRadioButtonComponent (tier-based layout); any other value (or omitted) renders the default SubscriptionRadioButtonComponent.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle component. Allows users to opt into trial-related reminders. The resolved component provides enabled/disabled states with associated text and styling.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is fetched and rendered. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle component definition from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings key.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for the placeholder text displayed near the toggle components. The resolved component provides text content and color, rendered as a title-style component using the title component mapper.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text is fetched and rendered. When false, the placeholder text is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text component definition from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings key.

content_id.description: Unique screen variant identifier used to look up this screen configuration. The app matches this value against the requested screen name; if no match is found it falls back to the 'default' variant.

footer.description: Configuration for the footer component displayed at the bottom of the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is fetched and rendered. When false, the footer is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the footer component definition from remote settings.

banner.description: Configuration for the main banner component at the top of the subscription screen. The resolved component provides banner image URLs with optional click actions and placeholder images. Supports IMAGE banner type.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is fetched and rendered. When false, the banner is skipped.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner component definition from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings key. Also supports experiment-specific keys in the format 'offer_screen_banners_{id}'.

description.description: Configuration for the description text component on the subscription screen. Provides additional descriptive content about the subscription offer.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is fetched and rendered. When false, the description is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the description component definition from remote settings.

title.description: Configuration for the screen title text component. Rendered with T6 typography and semi-bold font weight. The resolved component provides the text content and color.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is fetched and rendered. When false, the title is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the title component definition from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings key.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close button that dismisses the subscription offer screen. The resolved component provides visibility, alignment (LEFT or RIGHT), custom icon URL, margins, and optional show delay timer.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button is fetched and rendered. When false, a default close button is shown instead.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the close button component definition from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings key.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the screen subtitle text component. Rendered with T5 typography and medium font weight. The resolved component provides the text content and color.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is fetched and rendered. When false, the subtitle is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subtitle component definition from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings key.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder component that displays promotional text and an optional badge image with a shadow effect, shown as an overlay or alternative to the main banner.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder component is fetched and rendered. When false, the component is skipped entirely.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component definition from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings key.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for the secondary button displayed as underlined text. The resolved component provides text, color, an optional action deep link, and a touchpoint. If an action is set it opens a hook/deep link; otherwise it opens the subscription tiers half-screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is fetched and rendered. When false, the button is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the secondary button component definition from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings key.

logo.description: Configuration for the logo component displayed on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is fetched and rendered. When false, the logo is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the logo component definition from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package switch toggle that lets users switch between different subscription packages (e.g., toggling between a standard and a free trial package). The resolved component provides enabled/disabled states with separate titles, subtitles, descriptions, associated package IDs, and styling.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the switch package toggle is fetched and rendered. When false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker used internally for recomposition optimization. Not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle component definition from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings key.
